title: Hello endpoint returns JSON greeting
description: The /hello endpoint must return a JSON object with a 'message' field containing a greeting string. The response must have Content-Type application/json and return HTTP 200.

title: Goodbye endpoint returns JSON farewell
description: The /goodbye endpoint must return a JSON object with a 'message' field containing a farewell string. The response must have Content-Type application/json and return HTTP 200.

title: UI displays messages from API endpoints
description: The frontend must fetch from both /hello and /goodbye endpoints and display the returned messages in the HTML page. Error states should be handled gracefully.
